who: medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 10-20 invoices/month
offer: For medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 10-20 invoices/month, inaccurate billing codes cause claim denials. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of billing codes and claims.
problem: Inaccurate billing codes lead to claim denials and delayed payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing specialists
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to medical billing specialists with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try manual entry of billing codes and error reporting for mismatched codes on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
